message:
feat(tui): add global search shortcut, reduce debounce latency, and show message body snippets

- Add `/` global keyboard shortcut to open SearchCockpit with query bar focused
- Add SearchFocused(String) deep link variant for navigating to search with pre-filled query
- Reduce DEBOUNCE_TICKS from 2-3 to 1 across explorer, messages, and search screens (~100ms latency)
- Messages palette now shows 150-char body snippets with extracted tags for fuzzy matching
- Enable console_ui_auto_size by default in config
- Update dependencies: getrandom 0.4.1, nix 0.31.1, polling 3.11.0, ahash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
